facebook.caption: Perched on a rocky outcrop where the river meets the sea, Dinh Cậu Lighthouse is one of the most iconic spots in Phu Quoc. This small but striking lighthouse doubles as a shrine, blending spiritual tradition with sweeping ocean views. Visitors love arriving around sunset, when the sky turns golden and the fishing boats head out for the night. It is easy to reach from the main strip in Dương Đông town, so add it to your first evening on the island. Practical tip: get there 30 minutes before sunset to secure a good spot on the rocks.

instagram.caption: Sunset, sea breeze, and a lighthouse that doubles as a shrine. Dinh Cậu is the kind of place that makes you stop scrolling and just breathe it in. Arrive 30 minutes before golden hour for the best spot on the rocks. Rated 4.3/5 and honestly, we get it.

tiktok.caption: The lighthouse shrine that steals every Phu Quoc sunset. Go 30 min early. Trust us. #PhuQuoc #DinhCau #VietnamTravel #SunsetViews

scenes: A shrine AND a sunset spot
Fishing boats heading out at dusk
